description: Machine-readable orchestration RACI mirror for shared write-authority surfaces.
rules: surfaces entries require surface, primaryOwner, consults, and rawOwnerCell.
primaryOwner is a canonical lowercase token or sanctioned role token.
rawOwnerCell preserves the exact owner cell from the Markdown RACI table.
approvedExceptions entries require persona, surface, scope, reason, authorizedDate, and authorizedBy.
approvedExceptions surface must match a surfaces[].surface value verbatim.
approvedExceptions scope is an explicit sub-path, not a wildcard.
